dialogue: renna_ashfall_scavenger: They don't negotiate, Kaelen. They march under a single standard, killing anyone who doesn't kneel within ten heartbeats. My best scout barely made it back to the low-depths before his lungs turned to glass. They are moving fast. Faster than you can plan for.
